  • OS *: Windows 7
  • Processor: Intel Core i3 2 gen
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Intel HD Graphics 2000
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: The game is basically an interactive visual novel, it should run on basically anything.
